title: Resolution Authorizing the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) Through the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Anthony F. Genuino to Enter Into Contract for the Services of Mr. Romeo J. Lalican As Consultant for Public Safety and Peacekeeping with Corresponding Monthly Compensation of Twenty Thousand Pesos (P 20,000.00). Councilor Jonathan Bryan S. Siytiap 01/23/2023
